product: Block specific internet destinations in network policies (Public Preview)
tagline: You can now block internet destinations from serverless workloads through the network policies REST API.
what_it_does: You can now block internet destinations from serverless workloads through the network policies REST API. Blocked destinations are enforced regardless of the policy's network access mode. This page explains how to configure and manage network policies to control outbound network connections from your serverless workloads in Databricks.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.

capabilities.desc: If your notebook does not interact with Spark, you can terminate then reattach serverless compute to refresh the network policy.
